theory.intro: A timetable is a table of times. Each row is usually a stop or service and each column is a time, often written in 24-hour notation.
facts: Read **down a column** to follow one trip; read **across a row** to follow one stop.
Find the cell where the right row and column meet.
To find a journey length, subtract the start time from the finish time.
steps: Read the time where they meet — convert to 12-hour if asked.

foundation.q: $\begin{array}{l|cc} \text{Stop} & \text{Bus A} & \text{Bus B} \\ \hline \text{Town} & 0900 & 1000 \\ \text{Park} & 0915 & 1015 \\ \text{School} & 0930 & 1030 \end{array}$ When does Bus A leave Town?

$\begin{array}{l|cc} \text{Stop} & \text{Bus A} & \text{Bus B} \\ \hline \text{Town} & 0900 & 1000 \\ \text{Park} & 0915 & 1015 \\ \text{School} & 0930 & 1030 \end{array}$ When does Bus B reach School?
$\begin{array}{l|cc} \text{Stop} & \text{Bus A} & \text{Bus B} \\ \hline \text{Town} & 0900 & 1000 \\ \text{Park} & 0915 & 1015 \\ \text{School} & 0930 & 1030 \end{array}$ When does Bus A reach Park?

$\begin{array}{l|cc} \text{Stop} & \text{Bus A} & \text{Bus B} \\ \hline \text{Town} & 0900 & 1000 \\ \text{Park} & 0915 & 1015 \\ \text{School} & 0930 & 1030 \end{array}$ Which bus reaches School earlier?

$\begin{array}{l|cc} \text{Stop} & \text{Bus A} & \text{Bus B} \\ \hline \text{Town} & 0900 & 1000 \\ \text{Park} & 0915 & 1015 \\ \text{School} & 0930 & 1030 \end{array}$ How long does Bus A take from Town to School?

$\begin{array}{l|cc} \text{Stop} & \text{Bus A} & \text{Bus B} \\ \hline \text{Town} & 0900 & 1000 \\ \text{Park} & 0915 & 1015 \\ \text{School} & 0930 & 1030 \end{array}$ Write Bus B's Town departure in 12-hour time.

$\begin{array}{l|cc} \text{Train} & \text{Service 1} & \text{Service 2} \\ \hline \text{City} & 0810 & 0910 \\ \text{Bridge} & 0825 & 0925 \\ \text{Beach} & 0840 & 0940 \end{array}$ How long is Service 1 from City to Beach?

development.q: $\begin{array}{l|ccc} \text{Stop} & \text{T1} & \text{T2} & \text{T3} \\ \hline \text{North} & 1405 & 1505 & 1605 \\ \text{Mall} & 1420 & 1520 & 1620 \\ \text{South} & 1450 & 1550 & 1650 \end{array}$ How long is each trip from North to South?

$\begin{array}{l|ccc} \text{Stop} & \text{T1} & \text{T2} & \text{T3} \\ \hline \text{North} & 1405 & 1505 & 1605 \\ \text{Mall} & 1420 & 1520 & 1620 \\ \text{South} & 1450 & 1550 & 1650 \end{array}$ How often does a service leave North?

$\begin{array}{l|ccc} \text{Stop} & \text{T1} & \text{T2} & \text{T3} \\ \hline \text{North} & 1405 & 1505 & 1605 \\ \text{Mall} & 1420 & 1520 & 1620 \\ \text{South} & 1450 & 1550 & 1650 \end{array}$ You reach Mall at $1455$. Which is the next service to South?

$\begin{array}{l|cc} \text{Stop} & \text{Express} & \text{Local} \\ \hline \text{Depot} & 0745 & 0750 \\ \text{Centre} & 0810 & 0825 \\ \text{Pier} & 0820 & 0850 \end{array}$ Which service is faster from Depot to Pier?

$\begin{array}{l|cc} \text{Stop} & \text{Express} & \text{Local} \\ \hline \text{Depot} & 0745 & 0750 \\ \text{Centre} & 0810 & 0825 \\ \text{Pier} & 0820 & 0850 \end{array}$ How much later does the Local reach Centre than the Express?

$\begin{array}{l|ccc} \text{Stop} & \text{T1} & \text{T2} & \text{T3} \\ \hline \text{North} & 1405 & 1505 & 1605 \\ \text{Mall} & 1420 & 1520 & 1620 \\ \text{South} & 1450 & 1550 & 1650 \end{array}$ Write T3's South arrival in 12-hour time.

$\begin{array}{l|cc} \text{Stop} & \text{Morning} & \text{Evening} \\ \hline \text{Home} & 0640 & 1740 \\ \text{Stop2} & 0700 & 1800 \\ \text{Work} & 0715 & 1815 \end{array}$ How long is the Evening trip from Home to Work?

$\begin{array}{l|cc} \text{Stop} & \text{Morning} & \text{Evening} \\ \hline \text{Home} & 0640 & 1740 \\ \text{Stop2} & 0700 & 1800 \\ \text{Work} & 0715 & 1815 \end{array}$ State the Morning Home departure in 12-hour time.

$\begin{array}{l|cc} \text{Stop} & \text{Express} & \text{Local} \\ \hline \text{Depot} & 0745 & 0750 \\ \text{Centre} & 0810 & 0825 \\ \text{Pier} & 0820 & 0850 \end{array}$ You must reach Pier by $0830$. Which services work?

$\begin{array}{l|ccc} \text{Stop} & \text{T1} & \text{T2} & \text{T3} \\ \hline \text{North} & 1405 & 1505 & 1605 \\ \text{Mall} & 1420 & 1520 & 1620 \\ \text{South} & 1450 & 1550 & 1650 \end{array}$ How long from North to Mall on any service?

mastery.q: $\begin{array}{l|ccc} \text{Stop} & \text{B1} & \text{B2} & \text{B3} \\ \hline \text{Quay} & 0930 & 1030 & 1130 \\ \text{Zoo} & 0955 & 1055 & 1155 \\ \text{Gardens} & 1015 & 1115 & 1215 \end{array}$ You arrive at the Quay at $1005$. When do you reach Gardens on the next bus?

$\begin{array}{l|ccc} \text{Stop} & \text{B1} & \text{B2} & \text{B3} \\ \hline \text{Quay} & 0930 & 1030 & 1130 \\ \text{Zoo} & 0955 & 1055 & 1155 \\ \text{Gardens} & 1015 & 1115 & 1215 \end{array}$ How long is the full Quay-to-Gardens trip, and how often do buses run?

$\begin{array}{l|cc} \text{Stop} & \text{Day} & \text{Night} \\ \hline \text{Port} & 1150 & 2350 \\ \text{Reef} & 1230 & 0030 \\ \text{Island} & 1305 & 0105 \end{array}$ How long is the Night trip from Port to Island, noting it crosses midnight?

$\begin{array}{l|cc} \text{Stop} & \text{Day} & \text{Night} \\ \hline \text{Port} & 1150 & 2350 \\ \text{Reef} & 1230 & 0030 \\ \text{Island} & 1305 & 0105 \end{array}$ Write the Night Reef time in 12-hour time.

$\begin{array}{l|ccc} \text{Stop} & \text{B1} & \text{B2} & \text{B3} \\ \hline \text{Quay} & 0930 & 1030 & 1130 \\ \text{Zoo} & 0955 & 1055 & 1155 \\ \text{Gardens} & 1015 & 1115 & 1215 \end{array}$ A visit at the Zoo takes $40$ min. Arriving on B1, which bus continues to Gardens?

$\begin{array}{l|cc} \text{Stop} & \text{Express} & \text{Local} \\ \hline \text{A} & 0805 & 0805 \\ \text{B} & 0830 & 0850 \\ \text{C} & 0845 & 0920 \end{array}$ How much time does the Express save over the Local from A to C?

$\begin{array}{l|cc} \text{Stop} & \text{Express} & \text{Local} \\ \hline \text{A} & 0805 & 0805 \\ \text{B} & 0830 & 0850 \\ \text{C} & 0845 & 0920 \end{array}$ How long does the Local wait or stop more between A and B than the Express?

$\begin{array}{l|ccc} \text{Stop} & \text{B1} & \text{B2} & \text{B3} \\ \hline \text{Quay} & 0930 & 1030 & 1130 \\ \text{Zoo} & 0955 & 1055 & 1155 \\ \text{Gardens} & 1015 & 1115 & 1215 \end{array}$ To reach Gardens by $1130$, what is the latest bus from Quay?

$\begin{array}{l|cc} \text{Stop} & \text{Day} & \text{Night} \\ \hline \text{Port} & 1150 & 2350 \\ \text{Reef} & 1230 & 0030 \\ \text{Island} & 1305 & 0105 \end{array}$ How much later in the day does the Night service leave Port than the Day service?

$\begin{array}{l|cc} \text{Stop} & \text{Morning} & \text{Evening} \\ \hline \text{Home} & 0640 & 1740 \\ \text{Stop2} & 0700 & 1800 \\ \text{Work} & 0715 & 1815 \end{array}$ A worker rides Home→Work each way daily. What is the total daily travel time?
